title: Commercial Roof Guide | Costs, Systems & Guides
h1: The Building Owner's Guide to Commercial Roofing in America
description: Independent commercial roofing resource. Compare TPO, EPDM, PVC, and metal roof costs per sq ft for offices, warehouses, and retail.

title: Commercial Roofing Guides (2026)
h1: Commercial Roofing Guides
description: 14 in-depth commercial roofing guides covering TPO, EPDM, PVC, metal, costs, maintenance, warranties, and more.

title: Commercial Roof Cost Guide (2026)
h1: Commercial Roof Cost Guide (2026)
description: National commercial roofing costs by system type, building size, and region. Includes 25-year total cost of ownership analysis.

title: TPO Roofing Guide (2026)
h1: TPO Roofing: The Complete Commercial Guide
description: The #1 commercial membrane with ~40% market share. Thicknesses, installation methods, manufacturers, and cost data.

title: EPDM Roofing Guide (2026)
h1: EPDM Roofing: The Complete Commercial Guide
description: 60+ year track record in rubber roofing. Ballasted, adhered, and mechanical options. Cold-climate performance data.

title: PVC Roofing Guide (2026)
h1: PVC Roofing: The Complete Commercial Guide
description: Premium single-ply with chemical and grease resistance. Ideal for restaurants and food processing facilities.

title: Modified Bitumen Roofing Guide (2026)
h1: Modified Bitumen Roofing: The Complete Commercial Guide
description: APP vs SBS systems, application methods, walkability advantages, and compatibility with existing BUR systems.

title: Built-Up Roofing (BUR) Guide (2026)
h1: Built-Up Roofing (BUR): The Complete Commercial Guide
description: The original flat roof system with 100+ year history. Construction methods, tear-off challenges, and when BUR still makes sense.

title: Spray Foam Roofing (SPF) Guide (2026)
h1: Spray Foam Roofing (SPF): The Complete Commercial Guide
description: Seamless application with R-6.5/inch insulation. Recoating schedule, self-flashing, and best applications.

title: Commercial Metal Roofing Guide (2026)
h1: Commercial Metal Roofing: The Complete Guide
description: Standing seam and structural panels for commercial applications. 40-70 year lifespan and insurance benefits.

title: Commercial Roof Maintenance Guide (2026)
h1: Preventive Maintenance for Commercial Roofs
description: Maintenance programs, inspection schedules, NRCA guidelines, warranty compliance, and budgeting for reserves.

title: Roof Coatings & Restoration Guide (2026)
h1: Roof Coatings & Restoration: The Complete Commercial Guide
description: Silicone, acrylic, and polyurethane coatings. When coatings extend life vs when replacement is needed. 50-70% cost savings.

title: Cool Roofs Guide (2026)
h1: Cool Roofs: Energy Code Mandates & Compliance
description: Energy code mandates (Title 24, ASHRAE 90.1, IECC), SRI ratings, CRRC compliance, and utility rebate programs.

title: Commercial Roof Inspection Guide (2026)
h1: Commercial Roof Inspections: The Complete Guide
description: What inspections cover, infrared scans, core sampling, moisture surveys, and pre-purchase inspection requirements.

title: Commercial Roof Warranty Guide (2026)
h1: Commercial Roof Warranties: The Complete Guide
description: NDL warranties, manufacturer vs contractor coverage, 10-30 year options, and warranty compliance requirements.

title: Green Roofs & Sustainable Roofing Guide (2026)
h1: Green Roofs & Sustainable Roofing
description: Vegetative systems, stormwater credits, LEED points, local mandates, structural requirements, and cost analysis.

title: Commercial Roof Cost Calculator (2026)
h1: Commercial Roof Cost Calculator
description: Enter your building's square footage and ZIP code to get instant cost estimates for TPO, EPDM, PVC, metal, and more.

title: Free Commercial Roofing Estimate
h1: Get a Free Commercial Roofing Estimate
description: Connect with pre-screened commercial roofing contractors in your area. No obligation, no cost.

title: Commercial Roofing by State (2026)
h1: Commercial Roofing by State
description: State and city-level commercial roofing data with local costs, building codes, and energy code requirements.

title: Approved Contractor Program
h1: Approved Commercial Roofing Contractors
description: The Commercial Roof Guide Approved Contractor program recognizes qualified commercial roofing contractors.

title: About Commercial Roof Guide
h1: About Commercial Roof Guide
description: Independent educational resource for commercial building owners and facility managers. Not a contractor.
